commits.message:
[Doc][Misc] Keep VLLM_USE_MODELSCOPE instruction in quickstart (#9493)

### What this PR does / why we need it?

This PR addresses the review feedback from PR #9484 by retaining the
`export VLLM_USE_MODELSCOPE=True` instruction in the quickstart guide.
This environment variable is necessary for users in regions with limited
access to the HuggingFace Hub, as ModelScope serves as an efficient
mirror. The redundant `pip install modelscope` command is omitted as it
is pre-installed in the provided Docker images.

Fixes #9454

### Does this PR introduce _any_ user-facing change?

No, this is a documentation-only change.

### How was this patch tested?

Documentation changes were verified for consistency.

- vLLM version: v0.20.2
- vLLM main:
https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/commit/0d4d334eaa583b9c09aa4eb7538c22db99fd84b3

Signed-off-by: nanxingMy <1014662416@qq.com>

+```bash
+export VLLM_USE_MODELSCOPE=True
+```
